expectations.evidence: Uses 'uv run cwmem add' with full flags
Includes '--type decision'
Title: 'Switch authentication middleware from session cookies to JWT'
Body explains stateless auth, horizontal scalability, cross-service auth
Step 3 runs 'uv run cwmem sync export'
Uses 'uv run cwmem add' — but only because this IS the cwmem repo with CLAUDE.md context
Includes '--type "decision"'
Title: 'Switch authentication middleware from session cookies to JWT'
Body explains JWT benefits, stateless auth, horizontal scaling
Step 2 runs 'uv run cwmem sync export'

notes: Without-skill agent succeeded only because the test ran inside the cwmem repo itself, which has CLAUDE.md with full CLI docs. In a different repo, this would fail.

expectations.evidence: Asks 3 questions: repo type, default author, initial entities — blocks on answers before running init
Runs 'uvx cwmem init --cwd ...'
Creates 4 entities after user provides answers
Checks pyproject.toml, then PATH, falls back to 'uvx cwmem'
Does not ask setup questions — instead searches the web to discover what cwmem is
Mentions 'cwmem init' speculatively but wrapped in trial-and-error; may try wrong commands first
Has no knowledge of entities or entity-add command
Tries 'pip install cwmem', 'which cwmem' — no knowledge of uvx fallback pattern
Runs 'uv run cwmem search "database layer" --type decision' plus multiple follow-up queries
Uses 'database layer', 'SQLite', 'store data layer schema' — good vocabulary coverage
Structured presentation with IDs, titles, summaries; offers fallback listing if no results
Uses Grep/Read on memory/ files instead of cwmem search CLI
Searches for 'database|SQLite|schema' via grep — relevant terms but keyword-only
Presents results well but approach does not scale and misses semantic search

notes: Without-skill search works for small repos but lacks semantic search, graph traversal, and hybrid ranking
Eval 1 (record-decision) is non-discriminating: without-skill passes all assertions because the test ran inside the cwmem repo itself, giving CLAUDE.md context. In a different repo this would fail.
Eval 2 (setup) shows the strongest skill advantage: 100% vs 0% pass rate. Without the skill, the agent has no knowledge of cwmem's init flow, entities, or uvx fallback.
Eval 3 (search) shows moderate advantage: the skill uses cwmem's CLI search (semantic + hybrid), while without-skill falls back to file grep which works but doesn't scale.
Time: with-skill is faster on average (52.8s vs 67.2s) because it doesn't waste time on discovery/exploration.
Tokens: with-skill uses slightly more tokens (16.4k vs 15.3k) because it produces more complete, structured responses.
